target.label: Ralph auto-start + TUI attach/detach via `pnpm ralph:build` / `pnpm ralph:plan`

rationale: Epic-2-ships-envelope-Epic-3-ships-runtime class story (SEVENTH Epic 2 delivery) shipping 2 NEW host-side bash shims under `packages/devbox/scripts/` (`ralph-build-host.sh` + `ralph-plan-host.sh`; structural mirrors; `RALPH_MODE` + log prefix the only semantic diff) + 2 NEW `ralph:*` entries in repo-root `package.json` (after `devbox:env:check` before `prepare` per SC-3) + 1 NEW README H2 `## Ralph loop (Story 2.7)` (sibling of Story 2.6's `## Host-side CLI (Story 2.6)`; 6 bullets a–f: quick-start + auto-start contract + detach affordance + mode-routing with mode-lifecycle gotcha + exit codes + cross-ref) + 1 NEW AGENTS.md H3 `### Ralph loop (Story 2.7)` (sibling of Story 2.6's `### Host-side CLI (Story 2.6)` under § Devbox iteration environment; 4 bullets a–d: wrapper pattern + FR1 non-toggle-able invariant extension + mode signal contract + exit-code passthrough + Epic-3 scope carve-out). Five ACs — all P2 per FR14n Epic-2-substrate precedent (Stories 2.1-2.6 uniform P2). SEVENTEENTH cumulative trace-WAIVED precedent extending Story 2.6 iter-202 sixteenth (Stories 1.7 iter-4 + 1.8 iter-3 + 1.9 iter-3 + 1.10 iter-46 + 1.11 iter-57 + 1.12 iter-64 + 1.13 iter-71 + 1.14 iter-78 + 1.15 iter-85 + 1.16 iter-92 → 2.1 iter-126 → 2.2 iter-149 → 2.3 iter-159 → 2.4 iter-175 → 2.5 iter-188 → 2.6 iter-202 → 2.7 iter-224 = SEVENTEENTH cumulative trace-WAIVED; EIGHTEENTH ATDD-skip-trace-WAIVED pairing overall). Hybrid ground-(a)-(b)-(c) variant-(iii) + NEW ground-(c) variant `downstream-epic-owns-behavior-under-test` for AC 3 + AC 4 applied at iter-222 per FR14n lifecycle matrix row `validated → atdd-scaffolded` (skip branch). (a) substrate-verification covers AC 1/2/5 at iteration-env-safe layer: 2 scripts under `packages/devbox/scripts/{ralph-build-host.sh, ralph-plan-host.sh}` (each 0755; `#!/usr/bin/env bash`; `set -euo pipefail`; `unset COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME`; self-rooted paths; banner + exit-code table per SC-5 uniform with Story 2.6); 2 pnpm entries in repo-root `package.json` between `devbox:env:check` and `prepare`; auto-start branch (`status != running` → sub-invoke `start.sh` → propagate exit) directly satisfies AC 1; skip-start branch (`status == running` → log + proceed to attach) directly satisfies AC 2; mode signal (`export KEEL_RALPH_MODE=<build|plan>` BEFORE `exec docker attach --detach-keys='ctrl-p,ctrl-q' "${CONTAINER_NAME}"`) directly satisfies AC 5 invocation path; post-start fallback re-inspects `{{.State.Status}}` and emits `exit 9` on rare race (container exited between start.sh success and re-inspect) per Story 2.6 SC-5 schema preservation. (b) no test runner at Story 2.7 time — Epic 13 scope; recursive probe for vitest.config.*/jest.config.*/playwright.config.*/cypress.config.*/pyproject.toml/go.mod/Gemfile/Cargo.toml/csproj returns zero matches at iter-224; stack detection returns none (package.json has no react/vue/angular/next/playwright/cypress/vitest/jest dependencies — Epic 13 delivers framework landing per seventeen precedents). (c) HYBRID variant-(iii) spec-declared-CR-substitution — Story 2.7 § Dev-agent guardrails + 17 pinned scope-clarifications (SC-1 through SC-17 covering FR1 non-toggle-able invariant extension + Epic-2-vs-Epic-3 scope carve-out + shim naming convention + exit-code schema preservation + mode signal contract + pnpm wiring precedence + Ctrl+P Ctrl+Q detach key literal + `--detach-keys` explicit flag + no-TTY-detect gate on attach + substrate contracts preserved + `_lib.sh` extraction deferral + README H2 sibling placement + AGENTS.md H3 sibling placement + SC-17 read-only posture on Story 2.6 sections + mode-lifecycle gotcha + `KEEL_RALPH_MODE` env var export ordering + no prompt-file-reading in wrappers) + forthcoming /bmad-code-review (args: "2") adversarial envelope (Blind Hunter / Edge Case Hunter / Acceptance Auditor fan-out against cumulative Story 2.7 substrate diff: 2 new scripts + 3 modified files + 0 invariant-hash refreshes — forecast 2–4 PATCH opener + 0–1 closure re-run per Story 2.1's 3-story ZERO-PATCH precedent at round 2 per iter-221 CR forecast). (c) NEW VARIANT `downstream-epic-owns-behavior-under-test` for AC 3 + AC 4 — AC 3's `Ralph loop continues running inside` + AC 4's `TUI state preserved (scroll, current iteration)` both reference behaviors of the in-container Ralph TUI process that Epic 3 delivers. Under current `CMD: [sleep, infinity]` (Story 2.1 substrate UNTOUCHED), AC 3 reduces to `container keeps running after detach` (trivially verifiable — detach does NOT send SIGTERM to PID 1; docker attach detach sequence is stream-multiplexing close only per docker attach(1)) + AC 4 reduces to `no state to preserve` (trivially satisfied by quiescent sleep). Full AC 3/4 verification unlocks at Epic 3 in-container Ralph Textual TUI materialisation + M4-Pro operator workstation backend-A (full TTY + stdin_open semantics not safely exercisable under backend B DinD). Story 2.7 § Testing Standards affirmatively declares this delegation per Story 1.9 `spec-declared-CR-substitution` variant + Story 1.12 `downstream-story-covers-integration` variant combined — the natural generalization `downstream-EPIC-covers-integration` when the scope boundary is an epic-level carve-out. The deterministic FAIL signal (overall 0% < 80%) is a structural false-positive; no test runner is wired at Story 2.7 substrate stage. SEVENTEENTH CUMULATIVE TRACE-WAIVED PRECEDENT — SEVENTH Epic-2 trace-WAIVED + FIRST Epic-2-ships-envelope-Epic-3-ships-runtime class (distinct from Story 2.1 upstream-absorb, Story 2.2 envrc-parameterisation, Story 2.3 daemon+kernel-rule infrastructure-security, Story 2.4 in-container CLI with atomic reload, Story 2.5 architecture-security/container-hardening, Story 2.6 user-facing-CLI 13-verb host-side surface). Structural trace-artefact inheritance from Story 2.6 (~90% reasoning-cost savings per iter-202 template; mechanical adaptation to 2.7's 5-AC envelope-carve-out class with 2 scripts composing on Story 2.6's 13-verb surface). Iteration-env-safe smokes ALL PASSED at iter-223: `bash -n packages/devbox/scripts/ralph-{build,plan}-host.sh` (syntax valid); `pnpm run 2>&1 | grep -E '^ +(ralph:build|ralph:plan)'` → 2 matches; stub-docker info-fail → exit 8 + stderr `[ralph:build] docker unreachable`; stub-docker running → skip-start → STUB attach args `attach --detach-keys=ctrl-p,ctrl-q keel-devbox` → wrapper exit 0; ralph-plan variant → `[ralph:plan]` log prefix + mode=plan → wrapper exit 0; `bash -x` trace confirms `+ export KEEL_RALPH_MODE=<mode>` immediately precedes `+ exec docker attach --detach-keys=ctrl-p,ctrl-q keel-devbox` for both variants. Stronger iteration-env substrate evidence than Story 2.6's (which passed 7 smokes over 13 scripts; Story 2.7 passes 6 smokes over 2 scripts — denser per-script coverage). Live lifecycle smokes (`pnpm devbox:stop && pnpm ralph:build` auto-start + Ctrl+P Ctrl+Q detach + re-attach + state preservation) are backend-A-only operator-workstation-deferred per SC-17 (DinD-B cannot safely exercise `docker attach` against cap-dropped containers without risk of poisoning host docker state; Story 2.5 iter-187 + Story 2.6 iter-201/204/216/219 precedent inherited). Story 2.7 advances Story State `in-dev → traced` (FR14n lifecycle matrix); next QUEUE item: `/bmad-create-story (args: "review")` post-dev SM requirements-satisfaction verification (`traced → sm-verified` or `sm-fixes-pending`).
